summary: Comprehensive testing of Income & Expenses feature completed. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified complete flow: page navigation, summary cards, tabs, filters, add entry dialog with income/expense toggle, category selection, treasury integration, delete with balance reversal, and Reports tab with category breakdown and Monthly P&L.

issues: One test account shows negative balance (-$1,000) from previous testing - minor data quality issue

passed_tests: Backend: Authentication required for all income-expenses endpoints (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/income-expenses - Create income entry with commission category
Backend: POST /api/income-expenses - Create income entry with service_fee category
Backend: POST /api/income-expenses - Create income with custom category (other + custom_category)
Backend: POST /api/income-expenses - Reject invalid treasury account (404)
Backend: POST /api/income-expenses - Reject zero/negative amount (400)
Backend: POST /api/income-expenses - Create expense with bank_fee category
Backend: POST /api/income-expenses - Create expense with operational category
Backend: POST /api/income-expenses - Reject expense with insufficient balance (400)
Backend: GET /api/income-expenses - List all entries
Backend: GET /api/income-expenses?entry_type=income - Filter by income type
Backend: GET /api/income-expenses?entry_type=expense - Filter by expense type
Backend: GET /api/income-expenses?treasury_account_id=X - Filter by treasury account
Backend: GET /api/income-expenses?start_date=X&end_date=Y - Filter by date range
Backend: DELETE /api/income-expenses/{id} - Delete income entry reverses treasury balance
Backend: DELETE /api/income-expenses/{id} - Delete expense entry reverses treasury balance
Backend: DELETE /api/income-expenses/{id} - Return 404 for non-existent entry
Backend: GET /api/income-expenses/reports/summary - Returns total income/expense/net profit
Backend: GET /api/income-expenses/reports/summary - Supports date filtering
Backend: GET /api/income-expenses/reports/monthly - Returns 12 months of P&L data
Backend: GET /api/income-expenses/reports/monthly?year=2026 - Filter by specific year
Backend: GET /api/income-expenses/categories - Returns income/expense categories
Backend: Multi-currency support - EUR amount converts to USD equivalent
Frontend: Income & Expenses page loads with summary cards
Frontend: Summary cards show Total Income, Total Expenses, Net Profit/Loss
Frontend: All Entries, Income, Expenses, Reports tabs present and clickable
Frontend: Start Date, End Date, Treasury Account filters present
Frontend: Add Entry dialog opens with Income/Expense toggle
Frontend: Category dropdown with all predefined categories
Frontend: Amount input with currency selector
Frontend: Treasury account dropdown shows active accounts with balance
Frontend: Save button creates entry and shows success toast
Frontend: Income entries credited to treasury (balance increases)
Frontend: Expense entries deducted from treasury (balance decreases)
Frontend: Delete entry shows confirmation dialog
Frontend: Delete reverses treasury balance change
Frontend: Tab filtering shows only relevant entry type
Frontend: Reports tab shows Income by Category breakdown
Frontend: Reports tab shows Expenses by Category breakdown
Frontend: Reports tab shows Monthly P&L table with all 12 months
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering bug in backend/server.py - moved /income-expenses/reports/summary, /income-expenses/reports/monthly, and /income-expenses/categories routes BEFORE /{entry_id} route to prevent 'categories' being matched as entry_id
seed_data_creation: Test entries created during testing: Commission Income entries, Bank Fees expenses. Cleanup fixture removes TEST_ prefixed entries.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Income & Expenses feature fully tested and working. Key features: 1) POST /api/income-expenses creates entry and updates treasury balance (income credits, expense deducts). 2) DELETE reverses the treasury balance. 3) Reports endpoints provide summary and monthly P&L data. 4) Frontend has Income/Expense toggle, category selector, treasury account dropdown. 5) Exchange rates are MOCKED in backend EXCHANGE_RATES_TO_USD dict.

reports.summary_endpoint: Working - returns totals and category breakdowns

mocked_apis.exchange_rates: Currency exchange rates are hardcoded in backend/server.py EXCHANGE_RATES_TO_USD
